name: Strawberry Super Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. For the crust, mix melted butter with flour, powdered sugar, and pecans. Press into a buttered 10-inch pie plate.
3. Bake for 25 minutes or until light brown. Allow to cool completely.
4. For topping, mash enough strawberries to make one cup. Cut tops off remaining strawberries and set aside.
5. Place mashed berries in a saucepan and add water. Mix sugar and cornstarch into the crushed berry mixture and bring to a boil on top of the stove, stirring. Boil about one minute or until clear and thickened. Set aside to cool.
6. For filling, whip cream until stiff. In another bowl, beat cream cheese with vanilla and powdered sugar. Carefully fold whipped cream into cream cheese mixture.
7. Spread in cooled crust and refrigerate.
8. When the crushed berry mixture is cool, place whole (or halved) strawberries on top of the cream filling, cut side down.
9. Cover entire filling with whole berries.
10. Gently spoon the cooled crushed berry mixture over all. The cream filling should not be visible between the berries.
11. Once the crevices are filled, do not overload the pie with the crushed berry mixture, as it will just drip over the sides. Any leftover crushed berry mixture is excellent on toast or English muffins.
